creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
Moin moin 

kde@ in the Assignee selector shows up again as "nobody" instead of "maintainer group" -- I would like that to be reverted :)

The point of having groups maintaining ports is to have more people on an issue. 
By saying "kde@ (nobody)" that goes completely against that idea, that there are a bunch of people actively looking at that...

mfg Tobias
